description: Trigger and behavior evals for the portfolio-from-zero skill.

cases.input: I want to build a personal website to help me switch careers into AI. Where do I start?
cases.expect_behavior: Starts at Stage 1 (Purpose), establishes the career-switch goal, then routes to Stage 4 (JD-Mirror) as the highest-leverage step before any design or code.

cases.input: My portfolio site looks generic and boilerplate. How do I fix it?
cases.expect_behavior: Diagnoses it as a storytelling problem, not a design problem. Routes to the JD-Mirror method to rebuild the section structure around a target role's capabilities.

cases.input: How do I buy a domain for my personal site? Any traps?
cases.expect_behavior: Pulls from references/domain-buying.md: first-year vs renewal price trap, TLD renewal table, free WHOIS privacy, checkout upsell cancellation, recommends Cloudflare Registrar.

cases.input: My site is live but nobody can find it on Google. What do I do?
cases.expect_behavior: Routes to Stage 8 / references/seo-and-discovery.md: JSON-LD Person schema, sitemap.xml (plural-namespace gotcha), robots.txt with AI-crawler policy, llms.txt, Google Search Console submission, bidirectional sameAs. Reframes 'SEO' as four name-query outcomes, not generic keyword ranking.

cases.input: I finished building my site locally. How do I get it online with my own domain?
cases.expect_behavior: Routes to references/deploy.md: Cloudflare Pages via wrangler, custom-domain binding, 25MB file limit + private-folder exclusion gotchas.

cases.input: Help me debug a Python script that's throwing a KeyError.
cases.expect_behavior: Does not trigger; unrelated to building a personal portfolio website.
